item.tbos.cracked_yesterglass_lens.toolt: Its fractured surface catches a moment that has already passed.
item.tbos.yesterglass_lens.tooltip: The glass remembers what stone forgets.
item.tbos.curator_core.tooltip: A catalogued instant, no longer under lock and key.
item.tbos.chronicle_shard.tooltip: A splinter of history released from the Fractured Archive.
item.tbos.recalled_hour.tooltip: Use during an Archive run to restore one shared revive.
item.tbos.cantor_sigil.tooltip: Proof that the Hour Cantor's final refrain was silenced.
puzzle.tbos.hall.title: ASTRONOMICAL ALIGNMENT
puzzle.tbos.choir.title: CHOIR OF RECOLLECTION
item.tbos.archive_survey_map.tooltip: Use to reveal the Meridian Archive, then use again for an updated bearing.
item.tbos.memory_plate.tooltip: Use on a Memory Lantern to load this scene; the plate is not consumed.
memory_scene.tbos.astronomers.title: The Orrery at Work
memory_scene.tbos.astronomers.descriptio: Astronomers guide the living rings through a measured conjunction.
memory_scene.tbos.curator_smith.title: The Curator Repaired
memory_scene.tbos.curator_smith.descript: A smith sets a new glass mechanism into the guardian's bronze frame.
memory_scene.tbos.celestial_family.title: A Family Beneath the Conjunction
memory_scene.tbos.celestial_family.descr: Three figures watch a captured star cross the Archive roof.
memory_scene.tbos.archive_evacuation.des: Archivists hurry toward the Meridian while the halls begin to fail.
memory_scene.tbos.final_command.title: The Final Command
memory_scene.tbos.final_command.descript: The Curator receives one last order: preserve this day forever.
memory_scene.tbos.archive_fall.title: The Instant the Archive Fell
memory_scene.tbos.archive_fall.descripti: The rings stop, the pillars lean, and one impossible second refuses to end.
message.tbos.archive.lens_required: A repaired Yesterglass Lens is required.
message.tbos.archive.curator_core_requir: The gateway answers only while you carry the Last Curator's Core.
message.tbos.archive.already_in_run: Your Archive run is already active.
message.tbos.archive.party_member_busy: A party member is already bound to another run.
message.tbos.archive.unavailable: The Fractured Archive cannot be reached.
message.tbos.archive.full: Every Archive path is occupied. Try again shortly.
message.tbos.archive.placement_failed: The Archive path collapsed before opening.
message.tbos.archive.preparing: The Archive is reconstructing this path. Entry will open when every room is safe.
message.tbos.archive.secret_discovered: The Lens reveals a cracked seam leading into a buried recollection.
message.tbos.archive.entered: Fractured Archive · Level I · 3 shared revives
message.tbos.archive.revived: Recalled at checkpoint · %s shared revives remain
message.tbos.archive.run_failed: The Archive has erased this run. Returning in 5 seconds.
message.tbos.no_site: The Lens finds no registered memory nearby.
message.tbos.unloaded: The memory cannot form while part of the site is unloaded.
message.tbos.blocked: The reconstruction is blocked by a living presence.
message.tbos.blocked_late: The reconstruction withdrew to avoid trapping someone.
message.tbos.protected: That part of the memory is protected while the site is active.
message.tbos.alignment.remembered_only: The broken dial cannot turn. Reconstruct the Hall first.
message.tbos.alignment.begin: Three engraved targets wait. Turn each dial until a solid glass beam reaches its mark. Crouch-use the Memory Anchor to reset.
message.tbos.alignment.reset_remembered_: The reset pattern exists only in the Hall's remembered state.
message.tbos.alignment.already_complete: The aligned memory is now permanent.
message.tbos.alignment.dial_rotated: Dial %s turns; its engraved target remains dark.
message.tbos.alignment.dial_aligned: Dial %s locks onto its engraved target. A solid glass beam forms.
message.tbos.alignment.complete: All three symbols answer. Return the Hall to Ruin and cross the projected path.
message.tbos.alignment.reset: The three dials return to their north marks.
message.tbos.choir.begin: Watch the four symbols. Each light, silhouette, pitch, and subtitle marks one step; repeat them after returning to Ruin.
message.tbos.choir.wait: The Choir is still moving between memories.
message.tbos.choir.observe: Observe the remembered sequence now; reproduce it in Ruin.
message.tbos.choir.already_complete: The Choir's final cadence is already remembered.
message.tbos.choir.incorrect: The cadence releases without penalty. Incorrect attempts: %s. The sequence begins again.
message.tbos.choir.strong_hint: The surviving mechanism etches the full order: %s → %s → %s → %s.
message.tbos.choir.complete: The Choir remembers you. Return through the newly projected Ruin path.
message.tbos.choir.reset: The Choir returns to its first beat; failed attempts are cleared.
message.tbos.meridian.begin: The first bridge exists only in memory. Move the Meridian Relay between its three engraved sockets, follow the solid power line, then return to Ruin. Crouch-use the Memory Anchor to reset.
message.tbos.meridian.wait: The Broken Meridian is still shifting.
message.tbos.meridian.remembered_only: Only the remembered Meridian Relay can be moved.
message.tbos.meridian.already_complete: The relay's final position is fixed across both states.
message.tbos.meridian.destination_blocke: The next authored relay socket is occupied; movement was cancelled safely.
message.tbos.meridian.moved: Mechanical power redirects to the %s socket.
message.tbos.meridian.complete: The eastern channel answers. Return to Ruin; the relay's decayed remains now form the second crossing.
message.tbos.meridian.reset: The relay returns to its western socket and all power channels reset.
message.tbos.curator.awakens: The Archive Core opens. The Last Curator begins the Catalogue. Use the four Memory Anchors to change the arena state.
message.tbos.curator.wait: The Grand Orrery is still shifting.
message.tbos.curator.not_started: The Memory Anchor is dormant until the Archive Core is opened.
message.tbos.curator.anchor_triggered: MEMORY ANCHOR: the Grand Orrery begins to revise itself.
message.tbos.curator.already_active: The Last Curator is already cataloguing this moment.
message.tbos.curator.already_defeated: Only the Curator's silent machinery remains.
message.tbos.curator.phase_catalogue: CATALOGUE: expose the Curator in the Remembered Orrery.
message.tbos.curator.phase_revision: REVISION: expose the Curator in the Ruined Orrery.
message.tbos.curator.phase_erasure: ERASURE: both states expose the core; every shift detonates stored afterimages.
message.tbos.curator.core_sealed: The Curator's core is SEALED in this state.
message.tbos.curator.telegraph_catalogue: CATALOGUE LINE: leave the marked row.
message.tbos.curator.telegraph_revision: REVISION ARC: leave the marked radius.
message.tbos.curator.telegraph_erasure: AFTERIMAGE STORED: shift the Orrery carefully.
message.tbos.curator.afterimages_detonat: AFTERIMAGES DETONATE at their recorded positions.
message.tbos.curator.defeated: The Last Curator falls. Its Archive Core becomes a gateway to the Fractured Archive; carry the Curator Core and use a repaired Lens to enter.
message.tbos.lantern.scene_loaded: MEMORY LOADED: %s. Empty-hand use to play; crouch-use to clear.
message.tbos.lantern.empty: The lantern holds no memory. Use a Memory Plate on it first.
message.tbos.lantern.cleared: The selected memory releases from the lantern.
message.tbos.survey_map.located: The Meridian Archive lies %s, about %s blocks away. Overworld coordinates: %s, %s.
boss.tbos.last_curator.title: The Last Curator
boss.tbos.last_curator.name: The Last Curator — %s / %s
command.tbos.no_site: No registered Yesterglass site was found nearby.
command.tbos.reset: Reset the nearest site to Ruin.
command.tbos.debug_failed: The guarded debug transition could not start.
command.tbos.debug_cracked_lens: Gave one developer-placeholder Cracked Yesterglass Lens.
command.tbos.debug_shrines: Verified %s persistent Fracture Shrines in this world.
command.tbos.debug_memory_kit: Gave one Memory Lantern and all six component-backed Memory Plates.
command.tbos.run.none: You have no current Archive run.
command.tbos.run.not_active: No active Archive run can change state.
advancements.tbos.root.title: Every Ruin Has a Before
advancements.tbos.root.description: Discover a fracture in the Archive's forgotten history.
advancements.tbos.repair_lens.title: Through Yesterglass
advancements.tbos.repair_lens.descriptio: Repair the Lens with copper, glass, and amethyst.
advancements.tbos.enter_archive.title: The Meridian Archive
advancements.tbos.enter_archive.descript: Follow the Survey Map and enter the forgotten Archive.
advancements.tbos.solve_hall.title: Lines Across Time
advancements.tbos.solve_hall.description: Align all three mechanisms in the Hall of Alignment.
advancements.tbos.complete_choir.title: The Hours Answer
advancements.tbos.cross_meridian.title: Causality Has Weight
advancements.tbos.cross_meridian.descrip: Position the relay and cross the Broken Meridian.
advancements.tbos.defeat_curator.title: Nothing Escapes the Archive
advancements.tbos.defeat_curator.descrip: Defeat the Last Curator by revising the Grand Orrery around it.
advancements.tbos.obtain_lantern.title: A Memory Made Small
advancements.tbos.obtain_lantern.descrip: Place the Memory Lantern released by the Last Curator.
advancements.tbos.collect_plates.title: Six Ways to Remember
advancements.tbos.collect_plates.descrip: Carry all six Memory Plate scenes at once.
advancements.tbos.display_scene.title: The Past, Kept Kindly
advancements.tbos.display_scene.descript: Let a Memory Lantern play one complete scene.
message.tbos.archive.protected: The Archive rejects changes to its recalled structure.
